name: Spareribs and Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a skillet, lightly brown the spareribs in butter. Sprinkle with pepper.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together sauerkraut, onions, and carrots.
4. Place half of this mixture in a baking dish. Add half the apple slices and all the spareribs.
5. Cover with the remaining sauerkraut mixture, apple slices, and wine.
6. Bake for 1 hour and 45 minutes.
7. Serve with mashed potatoes.
